info.title: Whisper API
info.description: REST API for Whisper social media platform

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT token
Create a new post, optionally with a poll

get.description: Retrieve personalized feed of posts from followed users
Retrieve a single post by its ID
Retrieve all comments for a specific post

post.summary: Add a comment to a post
post.description: Add a comment to a specific post
Cast a vote on a post's poll

delete.description: Unfollow a user by their ID

get.description: Retrieve list of followers for a user
Retrieve list of users a user is following

post.description: Repost a post with optional content

put.description: Mark a specific notification as read
Mark all user notifications as read

post.description: Add a reaction to a post

get.description: Get all reactions of a specific type for a post
Get hashtag suggestions based on partial input
Search across users, posts, and hashtags

delete.description: Unblock a user by block ID
Unmute a user by mute ID

post.description: Report a user, post, or comment

put.description: Update the status of a moderation report
Ban a user from the platform
